settings.heading: League Compliance
settings.content:
USA Hockey: HECC CERTIFIED for play under USA Hockey regulations. HECC certification is required for 18U organized play in the United States. Download HECC Certificate

UKCA & CE Certified: Meets European safety standards for protective equipment. Designed for compliance with regulations across European leagues and recreational play.

Approved for play in the NHL: Download NHL Certificate

settings.heading: Size Chart
settings.content: View Size Chart

settings.heading: Product Disclamer
settings.content:
Products offering “cut resistance” and “cut protection” do not 100% prevent or eliminate cut injuries or lacerations, especially against powered blades or sharp equipment.

The information provided by Titan Battlegear is based on current knowledge and is intended as guidance for your decisions or product selections.

Titan Battlegear’s cut protection products are highly resistant to cuts, but they are not completely cut-proof. Nothing is 100% cut-proof under all conditions.

The Battlegear collection provides a very high level of protection, but caution is advised during use. Despite their high resistance to cuts, there is always a possibility that objects could penetrate these products under certain circumstances.

settings.heading: Care Instructions
settings.content:
• Hand or Machine Wash, Cold
  • Line or Tumble Dry, No Heat
  • No Bleach
  • Do Not Iron or Dry Clean

settings.text: MINIMUM A6 CUT RESISTANCE REQUIRED TO STOP SKATE BLADE

Clinical Journal of Sports Medicine

settings.heading: Need help?
settings.description: If you have any questions, you are always welcome to contact us. We'll get back to you as soon as possible, within 24 hours on weekdays.

settings.title: What's the Difference Between 3.0 and 2.0 BattleGear?
settings.text: Titan BattleGear 3.0 features the new Titanotex™ Aero, our third generation of cut-resistant material. Titanotex™ Aero is 75% lighter than gen 2 Titanotex™, and stretches 25% more, to make sliding the baselayer over your head easier than ever. Lastly, the wrist protection is now a level A9, and provides an extra inch of coverage up the forearm.

settings.title: What Makes Titan Battlegear The Safest?
settings.text: Titan Battlegear's hockey neck guard utilizes advanced American-made cut-resistant materials and a unique collar design to maximize coverage of critical zones.

settings.title: Other Brands Use Kevlar®, Why is Titan’s Titanotex™ Cut Resistance is Better?
settings.text:
Most Kevlar® fabrics offer an ANSI cut resistance level A2, and in very rare occasions level A3 (on a scale of A1 to A9).

Titan's hockey neck guard shirt utilizes proprietary, American made fabrics, delivering the highest cut-resistance: level A9, which makes it 200 stronger than steel, and almost 5 times more cut resistant than Kevlar® products.

settings.title: Are there certifications for the USA Hockey mandated laceration protection?
settings.text:
New USA Hockey rules state that for a neck guard to qualify for all players 18 and under in the United States, they must have an HECC certification.

Currently the only brand available at major retailers with an HECC Certification is Titan BattleGear.

settings.title: How Safe Is The Shirt After Many Washes?
settings.text:
We tested cleaning with cycles across TEN Durawash twin-tub industrial machines. This is equivalent to 50 washes in a domestic washing machine.

The cut resistance level, following this washing process increased by 4%. Test reports from INTERTEK are available upon request.

settings.title: Where Are Titan's Products Produced?
settings.text:
The United States of America! Titan was born in Florida and produced in St. Paul, MN, and has additional factories in North Carolina, New Jersey, and New York.

The mass market and other independent brands produce in China, with questionable labor practices and superficial cut resistance certifications.

settings.title: Can I Customize Titan's Hockey Neck Guard Shirt With My Team Logo/Colors?
settings.text: Yes, Titan's Custom BattleGear program offers custom gear for teams, as well as personalization by player, including name, number, and even their country flag to represent their nationality!

settings.heading: Didn’t find your answer?
settings.text: Don't hestitate to contact us
